scope: assets/maps/level_01 (theme 0 = Quarantine Street, campaign days 1-5). Only HD map wired into engine.

root_cause.destructive_alpha: removeDarkBg() flood-fill on hard near-black threshold floods through hollow ruined buildings and eats interior detail -> swiss-cheese holes + ragged fringe.
root_cause.collage_by_tiling: mid.png (3 building cutouts) and near.png (row of individual poles/towers) are drawn as full-width tiled parallax layers -> repetitive, floating-cutout collage.

kept.reason: cohesive premium night skyline, opaque, no artifacts

reprocess.action: regenerate as 2 discrete chroma-keyed buildings, skip hollow-ruin centre

rejected.reason: prop-palette tiled as layer = floating-cutout collage; poles shredded. Water tower salvaged separately.
debris strip shredded (swiss-cheese); noise across bottom, hurts readability

duplicates.note: all wrecked vehicles; keep bus + one car + police (3 total), drop suv as near-dup of car
midground overlaps far skyline; use only 2 discrete midground buildings to avoid building-on-building noise

risky: middle hollow ruined building excluded (sky passes through, cannot mask cleanly)
fx/rain.png multi-effect sheet may band when tiled; mitigate with low alpha
levels 02-05 not implemented; pipeline extendable later
